items.definition_en: A backstage pass gives special access behind the stage at a concert.
items.example_en: She won a backstage pass to meet the band after the show.

items.definition_en: An opening act is a performer who plays before the main artist at a concert.
items.example_en: The opening act played some great songs before the headliner appeared.

items.definition_en: A soundcheck is the process of testing sound equipment before a concert.
items.example_en: The band did a soundcheck before the audience entered.

items.definition_en: An endnote is the final song played at a concert.
items.example_en: The endnote made everyone cheer and clap loudly.

items.definition_en: Stage lights are used to illuminate performers during a concert.
items.example_en: Bright stage lights filled the hall during the show.

items.definition_en: A lead singer is the main vocal performer in a band.
items.example_en: The lead singer spoke to the fans between songs.

items.definition_en: An electric keyboard is an electronic musical instrument with keys.
items.example_en: He played the electric keyboard on stage.

items.definition_en: A bass guitar plays low-pitched notes in a band.
items.example_en: The bass guitar gave the song a deep sound.

items.definition_en: A chorus section is a group singing backup vocals during a concert.
items.example_en: The chorus section added harmony to the main song.

items.definition_en: A light show is a visual display of lights during a music event.
items.example_en: The concert's light show made the performance exciting.

items.definition_en: A press pass allows journalists entry to a music event.
items.example_en: She entered the venue with her press pass.

items.definition_en: A tour manager organizes and manages a band's concerts.
items.example_en: The tour manager arranged the transport and hotels.

items.definition_en: A road crew sets up and takes down equipment at concerts.
items.example_en: The road crew quickly prepared the stage for the band.

items.definition_en: An encore is an extra song performed at the end of a concert.
items.example_en: The crowd asked for an encore after the finale.

items.definition_en: A VIP section is a special area for important guests at a concert.
items.example_en: She sat in the VIP section near the stage.

items.definition_en: A mixer desk is used to control sound levels during concerts.
items.example_en: The sound engineer worked at the mixer desk.

items.definition_en: A stage dive is when a performer jumps into the crowd from the stage.
items.example_en: The singer did a stage dive at the end of the show.

items.definition_en: A tour bus transports a band during their concert tour.
items.example_en: The band slept on the tour bus between cities.

items.definition_en: A merch table is where fans can buy band merchandise at concerts.
items.example_en: I bought a T-shirt from the merch table.

items.definition_en: An acoustic set is a concert part with unplugged instruments.
items.example_en: The acoustic set gave the concert a relaxed feeling.
